channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: ‘SNL’: Watch Gorillaz Perform ‘Clint Eastwood,’ ‘The Moon Cave’
item.description: 🚀 Gorillaz rockin' out on SNL with 'Clint Eastwood' and 'The Moon Cave'! 🌕🎶 #Gorillaz #SNL #LiveMusic

item.title: Harry Styles Makes Surprise Cameo During Ryan Gosling’s ‘SNL’ Monologue
item.description: Guess who crashed the party? 🌟 Harry Styles surprised fans with a cameo on SNL! 🎤 #HarryStyles #SNLantics

item.title: Pitbull Plans to Replace Childhood Home With Mr. 305 Headquarters
item.description: 🎉 Mr. Worldwide is upgrading! Pitbull's childhood home is making way for the ultimate 305 headquarters! 🌴🎶 #Dale

item.title: Michael Stipe Sings R.E.M.’s “These Days” & “The Great Beyond” For The First Time In 18 Years
item.description: 🌟✨ Michael Stipe treats fans to a nostalgic surprise with a special performance of R.E.M. classics after 18 years! 🎵🎤 #MusicLegends

item.title: Watch Sudan Archives Cover Sade For XMU
item.description: 🎻 Sudan Archives puts her unique spin on a Sade classic for XMU! Let's vibe to this soulful cover together! 🔥 #MusicNews #SadeCover

item.title: The Veronicas Cover Sombr’s ’12 to 12′ for triple j’s ‘Like A Version’
item.description: 🎶 The Veronicas bring a fresh twist to Sombr's '12 to 12' on triple j's 'Like A Version'! Hit play and feel the vibes 🎤 #MusicCoverMagic

item.title: Harry Styles Brings ‘Kiss All The Time’ Home With Manchester One Night Only Show: 7 Best Moments
item.description: Harry Styles sure knows how to make Manchester swoon! 💋 Relive the magic with these unforgettable moments! 🎶 #HarryStyles #MusicMagic

item.title: Keanu Reeves’ Dogstar Announce New Album and Tour, Share Title Track
item.description: 🚀 Rock on with Keanu Reeves’ band Dogstar as they drop a new album and hit the road! 🎸🎶 #MusicNews #DogstarTour

item.title: Fucked Up announce ‘Year of the Monkey’ ft. Dan Bejar, Keith Morris, Walter Schreifels, more, share 2 tracks
item.description: 🐒🎶 Get ready for the ultimate musical ride with Fucked Up's star-studded ‘Year of the Monkey’ album! 🚀🌟 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Angélique Kidjo announces new LP ft. Pharrell, Nile Rodgers, more, shares “Fall on Me” ft. PJ Morton
item.description: 🌟 Get ready to groove! Angélique Kidjo's upcoming LP is a star-studded affair 🎶🔥 #NewMusic #CollaborationGoals

item.title: 8 New Songs Out Today
item.description: 🎶 Fresh tunes alert! 8 new songs dropping today to add to your playlist rotation 🎧 Let's vibe! #NewMusicFriday #MusicNews

item.title: Metallica Expand Sphere Residency to 20 Shows
item.description: 🔥 Metallica takes over Vegas! 🤘🎸 More shows added to their epic residency! Are you ready to rock with them? #MetallicaMadness

item.title: ‘Let Me Go to Work’: Harry Styles Preps Live Debut of His New Album in ‘One Night in Manchester’ Trailer
item.description: 🌟 Harry Styles is bringing the party to Manchester with his live debut! 🎶 Who's ready to groove with him? 🎉 #HarryStyles #OneNightInManchester

item.title: Goose’s Viva El Gonzo Festival Is a Choose Your Own Adventure Wonderland
item.description: Dive into the whimsical world of Goose at Viva El Gonzo Festival 🎶✨ Adventure awaits! #MusicFestivals #GooseBand

item.title: Arlo Parks announces North American tour
item.description: Arlo Parks is hitting the road! 🎶🚗 Who's ready for a vibe-filled tour across North America? 🌟 #ArloParksTour

item.title: Portrayal of Guilt Announce New Album and Tour, Unleash Two Singles: Stream
item.description: 🔥 Pump up the volume! Portrayal of Guilt is back with new music and tour dates! 🎸🤘#NewMusicAlert #TourAnnouncement

item.title: Harry Styles Believes Playing Residencies Instead of Touring Makes For a “Better Show”
item.description: 🌟 Harry Styles bringing the party to one spot 🎤 Who's ready for the ultimate concert experience?! 🕺 #MusicNews #HarryStyles

item.title: Jack Johnson, Alanis Morissette, Ty Dolla $ign, Vic Mensa Lead New Wave of SXSW 2026 Additions
item.description: 🌟 The SXSW lineup just got even hotter with @jackjohnson, @Alanis, @tydollasign, and @VicMensa joining the party! 🔥🎶 #SXSW2026 #MusicNews

item.title: Primus, Janelle Monae, Kurt Vile, Bouncing Souls, Hot Mulligan, more playing NJ’s North 2 Shore
item.description: 🎶 The North 2 Shore lineup is on fire! 🔥 Who's ready for an epic music-filled summer? 🌊🎸 #North2Shore #MusicFestivals

item.title: The Feelies celebrating 50th anniversary with 2 NJ shows (only 2026 dates)
item.description: 🎉 Let's party like it's 1976! The Feelies are bringing their iconic vibes to NJ for 2 epic shows! 🎶 #Feelies50thAnniversary

item.title: Dean McLachlan Announces Retirement From Mushroom Group
item.description: 🍄 Goodbye to the legend! Wishing Dean McLachlan a rockin' retirement after years of legendary music magic! 🎸 #DeanMcLachlan #MusicLegend

item.title: De La Soul Bring Magic to Career-Spanning Tiny Desk Concert: Watch
item.description: 🎤✨ Get ready to groove with De La Soul's mesmerizing Tiny Desk Concert performance! Watch now and feel the magic! 🎶 #DeLaSoul #TinyDeskConcert

item.title: The Mountain Goats announce Carnegie Hall show
item.description: 🏛️ Big news! 🐐 The Mountain Goats are taking over Carnegie Hall with an epic show! Who's ready to rock out? 🎸 #MountainGoatsNYC

item.title: Ringo Starr Hits the ‘Long Long Road’ on New Album With Sheryl Crow, Billy Strings, St. Vincent
item.description: 🥁✨ Ringo Starr takes us down the 'Long Long Road' with star-studded collabs! 🌟💫 #RockIcons #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Charli XCX, the Strokes, the xx, and More Performing at Outside Lands 2026
item.description: Get ready to dance under the stars 🌟 Exciting lineup alert: Charli XCX, The Strokes, The xx, and more at Outside Lands 2026! 🎶🎉 #MusicFestivalFun

item.title: Mitski Figures It Out & Feels the Love With First of Six Shows at NYC Shed Residency: Recap and Best Moments
item.description: Mitski's soaring at her NYC residency 🚀🎶 Rewind the magic moments with us! 💫 #Mitski #LiveMusic #NYCConcerts

item.title: Beck Announces Symphony-Backed Australian Shows for 2026
item.description: 🎶 Beck is bringing the symphony vibes Down Under in 2026! Prepare for a musical extravaganza! 🇦🇺 #BeckInAustralia #SymphonyMagic

item.title: Maya Hawke Announces New Album and Spring Tour
item.description: 🌸✨ Pump up the volume! Maya Hawke is hitting the road with new tunes! Who's ready to dance? 💃🎶 #MayaHawke #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Billy Corgan Claims Rock Was Deliberately Marginalized — Joseph Kahn Argues Political Correctness Killed It
item.description: 🎸 Billy Corgan sounds off on rock's fate! Joseph Kahn joins the debate 🤔 Who's side are you on? 🤘 #RockDebate #MusicNews

item.title: Sting Announces 2026 Fall North American Tour Dates
item.description: 🌟 Get ready to rock with Sting in 2026! 🎸🎶 Tag your concert buddy! #Sting2026Tour

item.title: Fans Choose RAYE’s ‘Nightingale Lane’ as This Week’s Favorite New Music
item.description: 🎉 Let's groove to RAYE's 'Nightingale Lane'! Fans are vibing with this week's top track! 🎶 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Fred again.. Brought Out Thomas Bangalter For Daft Punk Classics At London Residency Closer
item.description: When Fred again.. and Thomas Bangalter hit the stage, magic happens! 🎶✨ #DaftPunk #LondonResidency

item.title: RÜFÜS DU SOL Announce 2026 North American Tour: How to Get Tickets
item.description: Dance your way into the future with RÜFÜS DU SOL! 🌟 Score tickets now for their electrifying 2026 North American Tour! 🎶 #RÜFÜSDUSOL #NorthAmericanTour

item.title: Watch Billy Strings, Emmylou Harris, Alison Krauss, & More Play O Brother, Where Art Thou? Soundtrack 25th Anniversary Concert
item.description: 🎶 Join the ultimate bluegrass party with Billy Strings, Emmylou Harris, Alison Krauss, and more! Celebrating 25 years of O Brother, Where Art Thou? soundtrack magic! 🎉 #OBrother25

item.title: Mumford & Sons Surprise With Hozier, Dessner On ‘SNL’
item.description: Whoa, Mumford & Sons team up with Hozier and Dessner on 'SNL'! 🎶 Unexpected musical magic coming your way! ✨ #MusicCollab #SNLJam

item.title: ‘SNL’: Watch Mumford & Sons Perform ‘Rubber Band Man,’ ‘Here’
item.description: 🎸 Mumford & Sons rocked 'SNL' with 'Rubber Band Man' and 'Here'! 🙌 Who caught their electric performance? #MumfordAndSons #SNL #LiveMusicVibes

item.title: Jean-Michel Jarre to Make Ibiza Debut at Amnesia This Summer
item.description: 🎶 Ibiza is in for a treat as Jean-Michel Jarre hits the Amnesia stage this summer! Who's ready to dance? 💃 #MusicNews #JeanMichelJarre

item.title: Wu-Tang Clan Co-Founder Oliver ‘Power’ Grant Died After ‘Courageous’ Battle With Cancer
item.description: 🎤 Rest in Power, Oliver 'Power' Grant. Your legacy with Wu-Tang Clan will live on forever 🙌🏽💥 #RIPPowerGrant

item.title: Robbie Williams Leads All-Star Tribute To Lifetime Achievement Winner Ozzy Osbourne At The 2026 BRITs
item.description: 🎉 Get ready to rock out with Robbie Williams and Ozzy Osbourne at the 2026 BRITs! 🎸🤘 #LegendsUnite #RockOn

item.title: Times New Viking Reunite For First Show In A Decade
item.description: 🚀 Legends return! Times New Viking are back with a bang! 🎉 Let the music celebration begin! 🎸 #TimesNewViking #MusicLegends
